title: BEM-866 find Claude trace outputs
objective:
Run script:
"""
needle = 'bem865_claude_write_selftest'
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_claude_trace_outputs')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
count = 0
for root in ['governance', '.github', 'tools', 'scripts']:
    base = Path(root)
    if not base.exists():
        continue
    for f in base.rglob('*'):
        if count >= 80:
            break
        if f.is_file() and f.suffix.lower() in ['.md', '.json', '.jsonl', '.yml', '.yaml', '.txt']:
            text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')[:200000]
            if needle in text or needle in str(f):
                safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in str(f))[:140]
                marker = outdir / (str(count).zfill(2) + '_' + safe + '.md')
                marker.write_text('# BEM-866 Claude trace output candidate\nPath: ' + str(f) + '\nContains trace: ' + str(needle in text) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
                changed_files.append(str(marker))
                count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CLAUDE_TRACE_OUTPUTS_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-866 Claude trace outputs\nTrace: ' + needle + '\nCount: ' + str(count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('Claude trace output candidates: ' + str(count))
"""
No issue comments.
